lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition. The exterior is well-maintained with minimal wear. The interior is clean and shows standard signs of use. The engine and mechanical systems are in reliable working order.
Fair condition.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and minor dents. The interior shows moderate wear on the upholstery and carpet. The engine and transmission are operational, though the vehicle may require some upcoming maintenance.

Get ready to drive away in a masterpiece! This car is in truly mint condition, looking and performing exactly like it did on day one. It has been impeccably maintained, with a flawless exterior and a pristine interior. You won't find a better example on the market!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained. The exterior paint retains a nice shine, though it does have a few minor stone chips on the front fascia and a small, shallow scratch on the passenger door. Mechanically, the car is solid and reliable, with all scheduled maintenance performed on time. The interior is clean and smoke-free, showing only light signs of use on the leather seating surfaces. All power features and electronics are in perfect working order. This is a dependable, well-cared-for vehicle that offers a great balance of performance and value.

This vehicle is in showroom condition and has been meticulously cared for by a single owner. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, original shine and absolutely no scratches, dings, or chips. Inside, the upholstery and trim are immaculate, appearing brand new and showing no signs of wear or aging. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order; the engine runs silently and the transmission shifts seamlessly. It has been exclusively garage-kept, professionally detailed, and comes with a complete, documented service history. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that remains in its original, pristine state.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such uncompromising caliber and pristine preservation.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty. It's in absolutely incredible, mint condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it's brand new! I've taken such good care of it, and it's just waiting for its next adventure. You won't find a cleaner ride out there. Come check it out and fall in love!
This E46 M3 is a mechanical masterpiece, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with high-pressure Double VANOS
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Spotless interior. Mechanically perfect. Garage kept.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a collector-grade vehicle maintained in absolute showroom condition. This car has been meticulously garage-kept and protected from the elements since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like factory luster, free from any swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no creasing, and the dash components function with tactile precision. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a documented history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively by certified specialists. Every seal is tight, every fluid is fresh, and the engine purrs with effortless power. Included are the original owner’s manuals, two sets of keys, and a comprehensive service folder. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks, smells, and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presenting an automotive specimen of superlative caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting flawless aesthetic integrity and peak mechanical performance. For the discerning buyer who demands a pristine, investment-grade example, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by an immaculate, showroom-quality interior. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision and reliability expected of a premier-tier asset. Every aspect of this motorcar has been meticulously vetted to ensure it meets the requirements of the most discerning collector or enthusiast. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of unparalleled distinction.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? This beauty is in absolute mint condition and has been pampered since day one. It’s super clean, runs like a dream, and is totally ready for its next adventure with you! You really won't find another one this well-kept. Come take a look—you're going to love it!

This E46-generation M3 is a collector-grade example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, characterized by its individual throttle bodies and high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. The mechanical integrity is superlative, with a documented VANOS system overhaul and rod bearing replacement already performed. Power is delivered through a crisp
Mint condition. Flawless original paint. Interior is like new. Garage kept since purchase. Full service history available. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is the definition of showroom quality, meticulously maintained to meet the highest standards of a discerning collector. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, reflecting its life as a strictly garage-kept treasure. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition; the premium leather seats are supple and free of any creasing or wear, while the high-tech dash and trim remain devoid of any scratches. Mechanically, the car is flawless, having been serviced exclusively by certified specialists with a comprehensive paper trail detailing its preventative care. Every electronic component, sensor, and mechanical system functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to own a 'time-capsule' example that delivers a new-car experience in every sense.

We are pleased to present this superlative example, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. The exterior finish remains flawless, complemented by an interior that shows no signs of wear, preserving the factory-fresh environment. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to verify its peak performance and structural integrity. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and provenance.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, offering a showroom-grade aesthetic paired with flawless mechanical integrity. Discerning buyers will appreciate the immaculate preservation of both the interior appointments and the exterior finish. An investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty in person. It’s in absolutely pristine condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it's been garage-kept since day one. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin!

Offering an investment-grade E92 M3 in pristine condition. This example features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 with its signature 8,400 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. Mated to a crisp 6-speed manual transmission and a factory-spec variable M differential lock, the mechanical engagement is unparalleled. The chassis remains rigid with zero subframe fatigue, and the Electronic Damper Control (EDC) system provides precise damping across all drive modes. This is a collector-quality specimen with flawless paint depth and a showroom-fresh interior, meticulously maintained to ensure the rod bearings and throttle actuators remain within factory tolerances. A true purist's specification.
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless interior and exterior. Garage kept. Service records included.

Step into automotive perfection with this breathtaking, showroom-quality vehicle. Maintained with obsessive care, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish free of even the slightest swirl marks or stone chips, protected by a premium ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the high-grade leather upholstery is supple and unmarked, still carrying that distinct new-car aroma. Every button, switch, and electronic feature functions with factory precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history from certified specialists and having been exclusively garage-kept and hand-washed. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly pristine example that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

Presenting an automotive specimen of the highest caliber. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserving its showroom-floor integrity both mechanically and aesthetically. With flawless paintwork and a pristine interior, it represents the pinnacle of its class. An acquisition for the discerning collector or driver who demands uncompromising excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no aesthetic or mechanical imperfections. Meticulously preserved and rigorously inspected, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands uncompromising quality. Experience the pinnacle of pre-owned luxury, where every detail reflects a legacy of superior care.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied this thing since day one, keeping it spotless and perfectly maintained. If you're looking for a ride that’s practically brand new without the dealership headache, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering a superlative example of the E46 M3, featuring the iconic S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and an 8,000 RPM redline. This specimen is mechanically pristine: the double-VANOS system has been professionally overhauled, and the rod bearings have been replaced as preventative maintenance. The rear subframe—a known structural point—has been reinforced to ensure chassis rigidity. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to an M Variable Differential Lock. The suspension maintains factory-spec geometry with refreshed bushings and OEM dampers, providing the quintessential analog driving experience. The exterior paint is flawless, showing no signs of orange peel or rock chips, while the interior leather retains its original matte finish and structural bolster integrity. Documented service history confirms a rigorous maintenance schedule, making this a collector-grade vehicle with zero mechanical or cosmetic deficiencies.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included. Flawless interior and exterior.

This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a showroom-quality masterpiece that has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, featuring a deep, mirror-like luster without a single stone chip, swirl mark, or blemish, further protected by a premium ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the leather upholstery remains taut and supple with no bolster wear, the original carpets are pristine, and all electronics function with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is in peak form, boasting a comprehensive, documented service history with every scheduled maintenance performed ahead of time using only genuine parts. With exceptionally low mileage and having never seen rain or snow, this car offers a tight, responsive driving experience that feels exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a turn-key, investment-grade vehicle for the buyer who demands perfection.

We are proud to present this superlative example of automotive excellence, preserved in impeccable condition. This vehicle exhibits no discernable wear, reflecting a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. From its flawless exterior finish to its pristine, factory-fresh interior, every detail adheres to the highest standards of preservation. Mechanically robust and aesthetically peerless, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer seeking a vehicle of investment-grade caliber.
